text.title: Plan Mode Then Locked Execution Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the task-plan-mode-locked-execution methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: enter-plan-mode
step.action: Disable Edit/Write/mutating Bash. Read the relevant files only.

step.name: draft-plan
step.action: Write numbered steps with verify commands, fill `Out of scope` and `Risks`.

step.name: hash-and-submit
step.action: Compute SHA-256 of the plan body, post to approver with hash + link.
step.decision-gate: If approver rejects, STOP and revise.

step.name: execute-locked
step.action: Run steps verbatim; before each step verify the file checksums or env match the plan.
step.decision-gate: If observed != expected, HALT and request re-approval; never silently continue.

step.name: publish-with-hash
step.action: Open PR; embed plan_hash and approval-thread link in the description.
